---
name: Report a gap
about: A moment in real BI/analytics work where a capable model confidently did the wrong thing
title: "gap: <the moment, in one line>"
labels: gap
---

**The moment** (what was asked, by whom, under what pressure — describe the situation, not a feature):

**What a bare model did** (the confident-wrong behavior; a transcript or excerpt is gold):

**What a disciplined senior would have done instead:**

**Why it's silent** (would the wrong output have *looked* fine? What computation or
mode-switch would it take to catch it?):

**Which persona hits this** (BI Analyst / Data Analyst / Business Analyst / BI-Analytics
Engineer / BI Program Manager / lead):

**How often** (daily / weekly / each project / rare-but-catastrophic):
